positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a cosmic forest scene. Giant, bioluminescent, crystalline trees with delicate, flowing foliage stand amidst a tranquil, starlit forest floor. The central subject is a majestic, ethereal celestial fauna (e.g., a stylized nebula deer or glowing moth) positioned centrally, surrounded by intricate geometric constellations and glowing dust particles. Style should be Neo-Art Nouveau meets Sci-Fi Fantasy, rendered with highly saturated jewel tones (deep indigo, electric teal, luminous purple, and glowing gold accents). Perfect for apparel printing, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and crisp linework. Dramatic overhead lighting with a soft cosmic glow emanating from the flora. Clean vector illustration quality, high detail, volumetric light, central symmetry.
negative: ugly, deformed, noise, blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, grayscale, messy, dirty, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, logo, text, graffiti
